ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (left or right) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status */,
  "team_joined_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team name */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the match (e.g., Home, Away) */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the player performed */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose performance metrics are recorded */,
  "apps" INTEGER /* Number of appearances in the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made in the match */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall performance rating */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "tackles_made" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of successful passes */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy as a percentage */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the goalkeeper */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Whether the goalkeeper kept a clean sheet (0 or 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the responsibilities for the position */,
  "position_category" TEXT /* Category of the position (e.g., Attack, Defense, Midfield) */,
  "position_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was appointed */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the coach's contract ended, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the statistics (e.g., 2023/24) */,
  "total_goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored in the season */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made in the season */,
  "total_apps" INTEGER /* Total appearances in the season */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average performance rating for the season */,
  "total_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total number of minutes played in the season */,
  "total_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received in the season */,
  "total_red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received in the season */,
  "total_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots on target in the season */,
  "total_dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of successful dribbles in the season */,
  "total_tackles_made" INTEGER /* Total number of successful tackles in the season */,
  "total_fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls committed in the season */,
  "total_fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls suffered in the season */,
  "total_passes_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of successful passes in the season */,
  "total_pass_accuracy" REAL /* Total pass accuracy as a percentage in the season */,
  "total_saves" INTEGER /* Total number of saves made by the goalkeeper in the season */,
  "total_clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Total number of clean sheets kept by the goalkeeper in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouting_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scouting report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being scouted */,
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scout who wrote the report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the player (1-10) */,
  "strengths" TEXT /* Description of the player's strengths */,
  "weaknesses" TEXT /* Description of the player's weaknesses */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for the player (e.g., sign, reject) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_scout_id FOREIGN KEY ("scout_id") REFERENCES scouts ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "scout_name" TEXT /* Full name of the scout */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is injured */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "recovery_period" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery period in weeks */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., recovering, returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Performance-based bonus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
